name: omni-writing-scene
description: TEMPLATE: character writes text on camera — NBP keyframe (props/text baked) → Omni image_to_video with stroke-order direction → QA. The proven live-writing pipeline.

args.prompt: The same person from the reference — same face and clothing — standing beside a completely BLANK white whiteboard holding an uncapped marker, SCENE_DETAILS, photorealistic, 9:16 vertical

Animate this exact scene: the person writes on the whiteboard. [00:00-00:01] Uncaps the marker. SFX: cap click. [00:01-00:07] Writes in large clear block capitals the words BOARD_TEXT — writing naturally LEFT TO RIGHT in stroke order, one letter at a time, SPELL_OUT_LETTERS, exactly as a person writes, correctly spelled, no stray marks. SFX: marker squeak. [00:07-00:10] Steps aside so BOARD_TEXT stays fully visible, turns to camera and says, "SPOKEN_LINE" Keep face, clothing and room exactly as in the image. (no subtitles)

args.expectedSubject: CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION writing BOARD_TEXT on a whiteboard
